measurement_note: Size is S + E, the combined Student and Exam row count. Each independent exam has a low, middle, and high scorer, so all partitions and ordered output grow together. The 48/192/768-row tiers span 16x. Partitioned ranking and one grouped pass take O(E log E + S) time. A correct query that recomputes minimum and maximum scores with correlated subqueries for every participation can take O(E^2) time and completes normally.
